resumeBuilder.title: Resume Builder
resumeBuilder.subtitle: Build your resume with {{brand}} credentials.
resumeBuilder.tagline: Stand out with a tailored resume

launchpad.title: Apps

emptyStates.installSomething: Install something from the App Store to get started.
emptyStates.checkBackLater: Check back later — new apps are added all the time.
emptyStates.checkBackSoon: Check back soon, or browse all apps.

launchpad.aiDisabledMinor: AI features are not available for users under 18.
launchpad.aiDisabledPrivacy: AI features are currently disabled. You can enable them in Privacy & Data from your profile.

theme.title: Choose Your Theme
theme.subtitleColorfulFormal: Switch between our signature, colorful experience and a classic, formal style.

welcome.heading: Welcome to {{brand}}
welcome.subtitle: Sign in to access your credentials, achievements, and more.

qrApproved.heading: You're all set!
qrApproved.withHint: Sign in with <0>{{hint}}</0> to access your account.
qrApproved.noHint: Now just sign in below to access your account.

linkedBanner.noHint: Device linked — sign in to finish

installIntent.banner: You'll be taken back to <0>{{appName}}</0> after sign in

verification.title: Enter verification code or <0>start over</0>
verification.error: Unable to verify code. Please try again.

phone.smsSent: A verification code has been sent

seedPhrase.title: Use a Seed Phrase to Import Your Passport
seedPhrase.description: Enter your <0>64-character</0> or <2>word phrase seed</2> below to regain access to an existing {{brand}} passport.
seedPhrase.advancedOption: This is an advanced option for users who already saved their seed during passport creation. If you don't have a seed, you will need to go back and <0>create a new passport</0> instead.
seedPhrase.placeholder: Paste your seed phrase or key here...

important.heading: Important!
important.rule1: Keep your seed safe and offline.
important.rule3: If someone else has your seed, they can control your passport.

error.invalidChars: Seed must only contain numbers and letters (a–f).
error.tooShort: Seed phrase needs to be 64 characters long.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.header: Set up your profile to get started!
profile.privacyNotice: We ask for your age and country to make sure we comply with privacy laws and keep you safe.
profile.installBanner: After creating your account, you'll be able to install <0>{{appName}}</0>

error.createFailed: There was an error creating your profile
error.generic: Could not create your profile. You can still request parental consent now. Please try profile setup again later.

learner.title: Learner
learner.description: I'm a student building my profile and tracking my progress.

guardian.title: Guardian
guardian.description: I'm a parent or guardian supporting a learner.

teacher.title: Teacher
teacher.description: I'm an educator working directly with learners.

admin.title: Admin
admin.description: I manage systems, data, or user access for my organization.

counselor.title: Guidance Counselor
counselor.description: I support learners in planning their educational or career paths.

developer.title: Developer
developer.description: I manage systems, data, and technology for my organization.

underage.heading: Get an Adult
underage.description: You'll need a parent or guardian to add you to a family account before you can join.

schoolCode.heading: Enter School Code
schoolCode.description: To join without a parent account, please enter the special code provided by your school.
schoolCode.error: Invalid school code. Please try again.

loggingOut.heading: Logging out...
loggingOut.description: Please get a parent or guardian to login and create a family account.

addChild.heading: Add Your Child to {{brand}}!
addChild.description: Log in or sign up to create your profile inside a family account.

eu.heading: Parental Consent Required
eu.description: Please enter your parent's email so we can send them a consent request.

sent.heading: Request Sent
sent.description: We sent a consent request to <0>{{email}}</0>. We'll notify you once it's approved.

error.sendFailed: Failed to send consent request. Please try again.

us.heading: Consent Notice
us.description: We collect learning progress and credentials. These can be shared with you, your teachers, or verified organizations.

parentInvite.heading: Invite your parent to join {{brand}}!
parentInvite.description: Click the <0>Share Invite</0> button or type in their email and click the <1>Send Invite</1> button.

guardianLinked.heading: You're all set up!
guardianLinked.description: You're now set up to manage credentials for <0>{{name}}</0>. Future approvals will appear directly in the app.

slide2.regular: your education experiences in your Passport

slide4.regular: your learning with a growing suite of AI Tutors

slide2.regular: your child's privacy with secure, consent based data tools

slide3.regular: your child's learning with AI tutors and learning apps

slide1.bold: Organize all your students & learning data

slide3.regular: learners with real, high-fidelity proof of learning experiences

slide4.regular: your student's progress in real time

slide2.regular: your learners, teachers, and learning experiences

slide3.regular: your learning materials in one easy-to-use app

slide4.regular: advanced tools and settings for data sharing and more

slide1.regular: issuers, consent protocols and connected systems

slide2.regular: with schools, applications, and data sources

profile.title: My Account
profile.didCopyFailed: Unable to copy DID to clipboard
profile.needParentGuardian: You'll need a parent or guardian to set up a Family Account before you can join.

delete.title: Delete Account?
delete.warning: Deleting your account will permanently delete your identity on {{brand}} and all of your credentials. <0>Warning, this action cannot be undone!</0>

export.title: Export Seed Phrase
export.masterKeyWarning: This is your {{brand}}'s master key. Anyone with access to this phrase can control your {{brand}} and your identity. - Do NOT share it. - Do NOT store it online or take screenshots. - Write it down and store it offline. - If you lose this, you may permanently lose access. <0>Are you sure you want to proceed?</0>

setPrimaryConfirm.title: Set Primary Contact Method
setPrimaryConfirm.text: Are you sure you want to set this email as primary?

removeConfirm.title: Remove Contact Method
removeConfirm.text: Are you sure you want to remove this email?

verify.pleaseWait: Just a moment while we complete your verification.
verify.success: Your email has successfully been verified.
verify.failedDesc: We couldn't verify your email. The token may be invalid or expired. Please try again or request a new verification email.

seed.copyConfirm: Are you sure you want to copy this to clipboard?
seed.copyFailedToast: Unable to copy seed phrase to clipboard
seed.howToStore: How to store your seed phrase safely?

settings.minorWarning: Some features are restricted for users under 18.
settings.aiFeaturesDesc: AI tutoring sessions, insights, and personalization
settings.analyticsDesc: Help improve {{brand}} with anonymous usage data
settings.bugReportsDesc: Automatically send crash reports to help fix issues

connectionRequests.title: New Connection Requests
connectionRequests.description: When someone scans your code or clicks your user links it will initiate a network request that you can accept or deny.

newBoosts.title: New Boosts
newBoosts.description: Boosts include all types of credentials including:  Skills, IDs, Achievements, Learning History, Work History, Currency, and Badges.

prompt.title: Stay in the Loop?
prompt.details: New connection requests, New boosts (like achievements, credentials, and badges).

privacy.profilePrivacyDesc: Control how your {{brand}} profile appears to others in the network.
privacy.profileVisibilityDesc: Choose who can view the details on your profile.
privacy.showEmailDesc: Let connected users see your email address on your profile.
privacy.connectionRequestsDesc: Decide who can send you new connection requests.
